name: lucascheung--lark-skill
description: Comprehensive Feishu/Lark integration skill for OpenClaw. Covers messaging, group management, Bitable (multi-dimensional tables), documents, calendar, video conferencing (vc.v1), meeting minutes (minutes.v1), task management, approval workflows, contacts, cloud drive, wiki/knowledge base. Requires the official Lark MCP server to be configured and running.
